log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+6=21 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster activates Gem Flight! (2 uses remaining)
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster: FAIL! 31 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:16+6=22 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster: FAIL! 41 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
